name: Pricing Page with Billing Toggle
description: Build a pricing section with plan cards and a billing period toggle (frontend agent rubric: pricing page). Required: (1) section id pricing; (2) toggle control id billing-toggle (button or input) that switches body or #pricing between data-billing="monthly" and data-billing="yearly" (or class billing-yearly); (3) three plan cards with class plan-card and data-plan one of starter|pro|enterprise; (4) each card shows price element class plan-price; (5) yearly prices must differ from monthly in the DOM (e.g. data-monthly / data-yearly attributes or dual spans .price-monthly / .price-yearly); (6) CTA buttons class plan-cta. Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS. FINISHED when complete.
source: Inspired by frontend coding agent rubrics: edit/generate pricing page with toggle (Frontman workflow analysis tasks).
